title: SPF Record Not Detected
description: Mail infrastructure was identified but an SPF policy was not detected.
impact: Missing SPF can reduce protection against sender spoofing and email abuse.
likelihood: Medium because real-world impact depends on receiving-side controls and mail usage.
recommendations: Publish and validate an SPF policy for sending domains.
Review legitimate mail sources before enforcement.
Pair SPF rollout with DKIM and DMARC improvements.
